sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8800" key="a)nqo/moios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθόμοιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8800.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὕδωρ μέλιτος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:2:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
